# Operator Training and Knowledge Transfer: Ensuring Smooth Handover to Production Teams

## 适用受众
Project_Manager

## 写作角度说明
设备交付不仅是硬件移交，更是知识和技能的转移。本角度帮助项目经理解析操作培训的关键要素，确保生产团队能够安全高效地操作设备。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
A technically perfect installation that fails to transfer operational knowledge to the production team is an incomplete project—the project manager's responsibility extends until the equipment is operated safely and effectively.

## 参考素材
- Training scope: normal operation, alarm response, emergency procedures, routine maintenance
- Training documentation: operation manuals (bilingual preferred), maintenance schedules, troubleshooting guides
- Competency verification: practical demonstration requirements, operator certification
- Training records: attendance documentation, assessment results, retraining triggers
- Knowledge transfer checkpoints: shift handover procedures, escalation contacts, 24/7 support contacts
- Ongoing support: post-handover support period, spare parts initial stock, service engineer visits

## 关键词
Operator Training, Knowledge Transfer, Handover Documentation, Competency Verification, Operation Manuals, Support Transition
